tasks.title: Add catch block to EncodeHandler.run() Promise.all to prevent silent second-rejection loss
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial: add a catch clause mirroring decode-handler's existing pattern; no architectural change needed.

tasks.title: Call decoder.close() before exiting feedDecoder when cancelled-while-paused and inputClosed
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward logic fix but requires careful reasoning about the cancel-while-paused state transition and NodeDecoder interface contract.

tasks.title: Populate folded metric fields on MsgDecodeFinal/MsgDecodeProgress to match protocol spec
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward: assign the declared optional fields from existing metric values already computed; requires understanding which fields map to which internal measurements.

tasks.title: Report backend init failure in worker_ready so pool can fail-fast instead of routing sessions to a broken worker
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward but requires extending MsgWorkerReady protocol type and updating spawn.ts to handle the new field — touches two files.

tasks.title: Emit worker_shutdown_ack on crash only when a graceful shutdown was in flight
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward: gate the synthetic ack behind a 'shutdownRequested' flag set by shutdown(); requires understanding shutdown handler-restoration logic.

tasks.title: Wrap void handleDecodeStart/EncodeStart with session-scoped catch to emit decode_error on unexpected rejection
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward: replace void with .catch(err => postSessionError(sessionId, err)) ensuring the session receives a decode_error/encode_error reply on unexpected throws.

tasks.title: Add total active session cap to worker.ts to prevent unbounded Map growth
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward: add a MAX_SESSIONS constant and check in handleDecodeStart/handleEncodeStart before creating handlers; requires deciding appropriate cap value.

tasks.title: Log terminate() rejection in ready-timeout handler instead of silently discarding it
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial: chain .catch(err => onDiagnostic?.(formatError(err))) on the worker.terminate() call.

tasks.title: Log terminate() rejection in shutdown-timeout handler to avoid misreporting clean termination
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial: same pattern as 017-008; attach .catch handler on the terminate() call before res().

tasks.title: Fix sidecarOffsets to record start (pre-chunk) byte positions, not end (post-chunk) positions
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires auditing consumer expectations (what do callers do with sidecarOffsets?) before swapping totalBytes accumulation order — a one-line change but must verify protocol semantics.

tasks.title: Use 'none' or error-state backendType when initBackend fails rather than defaulting to 'wasm'
tasks.reason_for_tier: Same root as errors-13 (017-004); implement together — extend MsgWorkerReady.backend union type and update pool handling.

tasks.title: Capture and forward import error in defaultImportNative/defaultImportWasm instead of swallowing via .catch(() => null)
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial: change .catch(() => null) to .catch(err => { onDiagnostic?.(formatError(err)); return null; }) with a callback threaded through.

tasks.title: Make isLoadedBinding fail-closed when probe property is absent (currently returns true silently)
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial: add else branch to emit diagnostic when probe is absent, or keep returning true with a clarifying comment that probe is optional by design — either way a one-liner.

tasks.title: Delete session from Map after onCancel in releaseSessionState to avoid redundant onSessionEnd callback
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial: swap order — call onCancel first (which removes via callback), then skip the explicit delete, or pass a flag to suppress onSessionEnd in releaseSessionState.

tasks.title: Validate sidecarOffsets.length === sidecarCount before including in done message
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial: add assertion or conditional guard before building doneMsg when sidecarOffsets is incomplete.

tasks.title: Route cancel messages to active handlers during shutdown instead of dropping them
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward but requires deciding which message types should still be routed (cancel/close) vs dropped during shutdown, and testing the shutdown sequence.

tasks.title: Pass post-push timestamp into maybePostDrain to eliminate redundant performance.now() call per chunk
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial: thread the post-push timestamp through as a parameter to maybePostDrain().

tasks.title: Pass post-push timestamp into maybePostDrain in encode-handler to eliminate redundant performance.now() call
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial: same pattern as 017-017; thread timestamp parameter through.

tasks.title: Ensure native codec emits owned Buffers to avoid ab.slice() pixel copy per progress frame
tasks.reason_for_tier: Complex: the fix requires either changing the NodeDecoder codec contract (external change) or adding a dedicated copy path; needs architectural decision on codec buffer ownership.

tasks.title: Ensure native encoder emits owned Buffers to avoid ab.slice() copy per encoded chunk
tasks.reason_for_tier: Complex: same root cause as 017-019; group into the same ADR on codec buffer ownership contract.

tasks.title: Create shared ErrorCode const enum or string literal union in jxl-core/protocol to unify error code strings
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward refactor touching protocol.ts + decode-handler + encode-handler + worker.ts; no logic change, mechanical string replacement.

tasks.title: Add cross-platform protocol parity test verifying node and browser decode-handlers produce identical message sequences
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward: extract shared fake-codec event sequence from existing test infrastructure and assert message parity between both handlers.

tasks.title: Add throughput benchmark for node decode-handler to make HWM/EMA regressions detectable in CI
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward: add a synthetic benchmark using existing fakePort and fake-codec infrastructure; requires defining baseline thresholds.

tasks.title: ADR: Centralize cancellation state into a single token/flag to reduce the scattered boolean surface
tasks.reason_for_tier: Complex refactor touching four boolean fields and 10+ call sites across decode-handler and encode-handler; architectural decision needed before code change.

tasks.title: ADR: Add watchdog/inactivity timeout to bound hung decode/encode sessions
tasks.reason_for_tier: Complex: requires defining timeout semantics, interaction with budgetMs, and graceful vs forced cancellation path for hung WASM/native decoders.

tasks.title: Add cross-session memory accounting to enforce a global byte cap across concurrent sessions
tasks.reason_for_tier: Straightforward: introduce a module-level totalQueuedBytes counter shared across all handlers, checked on onChunk entry.

tasks.title: Verify NodeEncoder.cancel() safety when called while chunks() iterator is in-flight
tasks.reason_for_tier: Cannot be resolved without inspecting NodeEncoder native/WASM codec contract; requires codec-layer review and potential protocol clarification.

tasks.title: Verify NodeDecoder.dispose() safely terminates the events() async iterator under concurrent cancel
tasks.reason_for_tier: Uncertain: safety depends on NodeDecoder implementation; requires codec contract inspection and potentially adding explicit close-before-dispose sequencing.
